name: Priority-Based Filters
description: Filter graph nodes by priority levels and criticality

filters.name: P0 - Critical/Mandatory
filters.query: tag:#priority/p0 OR tag:#critical OR tag:#mandatory OR tag:#show-stopper
filters.description: Show mission-critical items requiring immediate attention

filters.name: P1 - High Priority
filters.useCase: Plan sprint work and feature releases

filters.name: P3 - Low Priority
filters.query: tag:#priority/p3 OR tag:#low-priority OR tag:#nice-to-have OR tag:#enhancement
filters.description: Show enhancement requests and nice-to-have features

filters.name: P4 - Backlog/Future
filters.query: tag:#priority/p4 OR tag:#backlog OR tag:#future OR tag:#someday
filters.description: Show backlog items and future considerations (default: hidden)

filters.name: Security-Critical
filters.query: tag:#security-critical OR tag:#vulnerability OR (tag:#security AND tag:#priority/p0)
filters.description: Show security vulnerabilities and critical security work
filters.useCase: Security incident response and vulnerability management

filters.name: Compliance-Required
filters.description: Show compliance requirements and audit findings

filters.name: High Customer Impact
filters.description: Show items with significant customer/user impact
filters.useCase: Customer satisfaction and user experience improvement

filters.name: Critical Technical Debt
filters.useCase: Technical debt reduction and system health

filters.name: Quick Wins (Low Effort, High Impact)
filters.query: tag:#quick-win OR tag:#low-hanging-fruit OR (tag:#priority/p1 AND tag:#effort/low)

p1.name: High Priority
criteria: Blocker for P2 work or external dependency

applyingFilters: Toggle priority filters to focus on specific priority levels
Combine with status filters for sprint planning
Use color schemes to visualize priority distribution

workflowViews.incidentResponse: Show: p0-critical, security-priority | Hide: all others
workflowViews.sprintPlanning: Show: p0-critical, p1-high, p2-medium | Hide: p3-low, p4-backlog
workflowViews.roadmapPlanning: Show: p1-high, p2-medium, p3-low | Hide: p0-critical (firefighting)
workflowViews.techDebtSprint: Show: technical-debt-critical, quick-wins | Hide: feature work

escalationProcedures.p0: Immediate PagerDuty alert, stakeholder notification, incident commander assigned
escalationProcedures.p1: Daily standup review, product owner approval, sprint commitment
escalationProcedures.p2: Weekly grooming, team estimation, backlog prioritization
escalationProcedures.p3: Monthly review, stakeholder input, roadmap alignment
